summary: Japanese Books Fix Testing Complete - All 8 features verified. Fixed critical bug where `transform_sentence_for_frontend` was using `kanji_text` field (which contained placeholder 'なし。') instead of `japanese_original` field (which has actual Japanese text). After fix: Kokoro shows 37 chapters, Japanese text displays immediately in Kanji mode, English mode shows '(English translation pending)' message, source_language='ja' for all Japanese sentences.
passed_tests: Aozora Bunko import succeeds for Kokoro - status='completed'
Japanese book Kokoro shows 37 chapters after import
Japanese text displays immediately in reader (Kanji mode) - actual content visible
Reader shows script toggle with 漢字/ひらがな/カタカナ/Romaji/EN options
Switching to English mode shows '(English translation pending)' message
Japanese Kanji mode shows actual Japanese text (宅へ帰って案外に...)
source_language field is 'ja' for all Kokoro sentences
All 11 backend pytest tests passed (1 skipped - no alice-in-wonderland)

bug_fixed.issue: Japanese text not displaying - showed placeholder instead
bug_fixed.root_cause: transform_sentence_for_frontend() used kanji_text field which had 'なし。' instead of japanese_original field which has actual text
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Modified transform_sentence_for_frontend() in server.py to use japanese_original as primary source for Japanese books (line 352-361)

seed_data_creation: Kokoro book already imported with 553 sentences across 37 chapters
context_for_next_testing_agent: Japanese books fix verified. Key finding: For Japanese source books (source_language='ja'), the actual text is stored in `japanese_original` field, not `kanji_text`. The transform function now uses `japanese_original || kanji_text` for Japanese books. Kokoro has 37 chapters numbered with Japanese numerals (一, 二, 三...). English translations show '(English translation pending)' since translation worker is running in background.

japanese_text_display.evidence: Kanji mode shows actual Japanese text: 宅へ帰って案外に...

english_pending_message.evidence: EN mode shows '(English translation pending)' for all sentences
